Structure description is missing. def:Structure is required for all datasets.
Standard does not match expected format '<Name> <Version>'. Must use allowable standard names (SDTMIG, ADaMIG, SENDIG, etc.).

SDTMIG version is not allowable. Must be one of: 3.1.2, 3.2, 3.3, 3.4.
ADaMIG version is not allowable. Must be one of: 1.0, 1.1, 1.2, 1.3.
SENDIG version is not allowable. Must be one of: 3.0, 3.1, 3.1.1.
Key Variables is missing. In regulatory submissions, a key must be provided for each dataset.
Repeating has an invalid value. Must be 'Yes' or 'No'.
Repeating is not 'No' but Reference Data is 'Yes'. When IsReferenceData='Yes', Repeating must be 'No'.
Purpose has an invalid value. Must be 'Tabulation' (SDTM/SEND) or 'Analysis' (ADaM).
Variable name is missing. Each row in the Variables sheet must have a variable name.
Variable label is missing. Description is required for all ItemDef corresponding to Variable definitions in regulatory submissions.

Data Type is not a valid Define-XML type. Allowable values: text, integer, float, date, datetime, time, partialDate, partialTime, partialDatetime, incompleteDatetime, durationDatetime, intervalDatetime.
Length is missing but required when Data Type is text, integer, or float.
Length should not be provided when Data Type is a date/time type. Length is only valid for text, integer, and float.
Significant Digits is missing but required when Data Type is float.
Length must be a positive integer.
Text variable length exceeds 200 characters. SAS v5 Transport files restrict variable lengths to 200 characters.
Mandatory has an invalid value. Must be 'Yes' or 'No'.
Origin is missing. For regulatory submissions, def:Origin metadata must be provided for all variables at either the variable or value level.
Origin type is not valid. Must be one of: Collected, Derived, Assigned, Protocol, Predecessor, Not Available.
Origin 'Not Available' is not valid for ADaM datasets.
Source is missing. For SDTM and ADaM datasets, Source is required when Origin is not Predecessor.
ADaM Derived/Assigned variables must have Source = 'Sponsor'.
SDTM Source value is not valid. Must be one of: Subject, Investigator, Vendor, Sponsor.
Method is missing but required when Origin is 'Derived'. A MethodDef must be provided for derived variables.
Pages (CRF page reference) is missing. Required when Origin is 'Collected' and Source is 'Investigator' or 'Subject'.
Predecessor variable reference is missing. When Origin is 'Predecessor', the predecessor dataset.variable must be specified.
Variable order must be a positive integer.
Dataset referenced in Variables sheet does not exist in the Datasets sheet.
Where Clause is missing. Each value-level metadata entry must have a Where Clause defining when the value applies.
Where Clause comparator is not valid. Allowable values: LT, LE, GT, GE, EQ, NE, IN, NOTIN.
Value-level Data Type is not a valid Define-XML type.
Value-level Length exceeds the parent variable Length. For ItemDef referenced from a ValueListDef, Length must be <= parent variable length.
Origin is missing at value-level. For regulatory submissions, origin must be provided at either variable or value level.
Dataset.Variable in ValueLevel does not exist in the Variables sheet.
Method is missing at value level for a derived value. MethodOID is required when Origin Type is 'Derived'.
Codelist ID is missing. Each codelist entry must have an ID.
Codelist Name is not unique. The Name must be unique within the set of CodeList elements.
Codelist Data Type is not valid. Must be 'text', 'integer', or 'float'.
Codelist Term (CodedValue) is missing. Each codelist entry must have a term value.
NCI Codelist Code is missing for a CDISC CT codelist. Alias with C-Code is required for CodeList elements representing CDISC CT.
NCI Term Code is missing for a term in a CDISC CT codelist. Alias with C-Code is required for each term in CDISC CT.
Decoded Value is missing for a codelist term. When a codelist uses CodeListItem format, all terms must have Decode values.
Codelist referenced by variable does not exist in the Codelists sheet.
Method ID is missing. Each method must have a unique ID.
Method Type is not valid. Must be 'Computation' or 'Imputation'.
Method Description is missing. MethodDef must contain a Description element.
Method ID referenced by a variable does not exist in the Methods sheet.
Comment ID is missing. Each comment must have a unique ID.
Comment Description is missing. CommentDef must contain a Description element.
Comment ID referenced does not exist in the Comments sheet.
Document ID referenced does not exist in the Documents sheet.

Dataset references a Comment ID that does not exist in the Comments sheet.

AnalysisVariable is missing in the AnalysisResults sheet. Variables must be populated.

AnalysisPurpose value is not in ADaM Controlled Terminology. Values are controlled by the AnalysisPurpose extensible codelist.
